candidate_problem_record.subject: Biology
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
在蝴蝶某种类的2号染色体上已鉴定出一个基因。已发现该基因的mRNA转录本长度为1578个碱基对。下图显示了该转录本的一部分序列,灰色区域是已知的核糖体结合位点的一部分。如果遗传密码0-15被删除,可能会产生什么后果?\\
\begin{tabular}{lllllllllllllllll}
\textbf{0} & \textbf{1} & \textbf{2} & \textbf{3} & \textbf{4} & \textbf{5} & \textbf{6} & \textbf{7} & \textbf{8} & \textbf{9} & \textbf{10} & \textbf{11} & \textbf{12} & \textbf{13} & \textbf{14} & \textbf{15} & \textbf{16}\\
A & U & G & C & C & A & U & G & G & A & G & G & C & C & A & U & G\\
\llap{\textbf{17}}\rlap{\textbf{18}} & \rlap{\textbf{19}} & \rlap{\textbf{20}} & \rlap{\textbf{21}} & \rlap{\textbf{22}} & \rlap{\textbf{23}} & \rlap{\textbf{24}} & \rlap{\textbf{25}} & \rlap{\textbf{26}} & \rlap{\textbf{27}} & \rlap{\textbf{28}} & \rlap{\textbf{29}} & \rlap{\textbf{30}} & \rlap{\textbf{31}} & \rlap{\textbf{32}} & \rlap{\
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text: No translation would be allowed to occur.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
在蝴蝶某种类的2号染色体上已鉴定出一个基因。已发现该基因的mRNA转录本长度为1578个碱基对。下图显示了该转录本的一部分序列,灰色区域是已知的核糖体结合位点的一部分。如果遗传密码0-15被删除,可能会产生什么后果?\\
\begin{tabular}{lllllllllllllllll}
\textbf{0} & \textbf{1} & \textbf{2} & \textbf{3} & \textbf{4} & \textbf{5} & \textbf{6} & \textbf{7} & \textbf{8} & \textbf{9} & \textbf{10} & \textbf{11} & \textbf{12} & \textbf{13} & \textbf{14} & \textbf{15} & \textbf{16}\\
A & U & G & C & C & A & U & G & G & A & G & G & C & C & A & U & G\\
\llap{\textbf{17}}\rlap{\textbf{18}} & \rlap{\textbf{19}} & \rlap{\textbf{20}} & \rlap{\textbf{21}} & \rlap{\textbf{22}} & \rlap{\textbf{23}} & \rlap{\textbf{24}} & \rlap{\textbf{25}} & \rlap{\textbf{26}} & \rlap{\textbf{27}} & \rlap{\textbf{28}} & \rlap{\textbf{29}} & \rlap{\textbf{30}} & \rlap{\textbf{31}} & \rlap{\textbf{32}} & \rlap{\
metadata.explanation_zh: 转录本5'端的碱基位于非翻译区域(UTR),因为该区域通常包含核糖体结合位点。核糖体结合位点是一段核苷酸序列,允许核糖体识别并结合到信使RNA(mRNA)分子上,这是翻译发生的关键步骤。如果没有这个UTR和核糖体结合位点,核糖体将无法启动翻译,mRNA也就无法被翻译成蛋白质。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The core task is understandable: determine the consequence of deleting bases 0-15 from the shown mRNA region, where the shaded segment marks part of a ribosome-binding site. Although the raw table text is truncated and the image is a small strip, the stem, image, and rewritten variant together make the expected answer clear: translation would not occur.

题目依赖图像，但题干中视觉锚点表达较弱。
